narrative: A Machine Learning Engineer with six years at Razorpay, a product‑first fintech, brings solid ML and search expertise. Strong verified skill depth in relevant technologies is the main boost to his ranking. Hands‑on work with Elasticsearch and OpenSearch aligns with the search‑engine focus, while NLP experience supports retrieval‑oriented models. Product‑company background also adds relevance. Yet, his Kolkata location and unknown notice period hurt availability for Pune/Noida, and minor trust concerns plus lower platform engagement keep him near the bottom of the pool.
